step_rationale: Oxidative modification of lipoprotein; loss of cardioprotective function.
mechanism: Oxidized HDL loses its antiatherogenic properties and promotes foam cell formation and plaque inflammation.

references.title: The Oxidized Lipoproteins In Vivo: Its Diversity and Behavior in the Human Circulation.
[Front line of oxidized lipoproteins: role of oxidized lipoproteins in atherogenesis and cardiovascular disease risk].
references.journal: Rinsho byori. The Japanese journal of clinical pathology
